summary: The diff removes the ProfileSetup modal logic from App.tsx (RootComponent now renders AppLayout with Outlet directly, no ProfileSetup modal or profile-check logic), and the ProfileSetup.tsx file appears to have been modified (not removed, but the modal is no longer triggered). The registration routes remain accessible. Most REQ-1 acceptance criteria appear to be met, though ProfileSetup.tsx itself was not deleted — only de-referenced.

hallucinated_features.description: ProfileSetup.tsx was modified (submit button styled with saffron background and forest-deep text color) rather than being fully removed, even though the requirement was to remove it entirely.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-1 states the ProfileSetup component should be removed entirely. The diff shows it was modified rather than deleted, though it is no longer rendered.

hallucinated_features.description: A 'Start Your Tribe' card with a TribalLeaderRegistrationModal and Crown icon was added to the LandingPage, which was not requested.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked to remove the onboarding modal and ensure users land on the main app. Adding a new card and modal is beyond scope.

hallucinated_features.description: Color theme changes were applied across multiple components (saffron/forest-green tokens applied to AppLayout, LandingPage, ProfilePage, DashboardPage, ConnectionsPage, and index.css).
hallucinated_features.reason: No color or theming changes were requested in the build request.

hallucinated_features.description: useSubmitDirectorRegistration and useGetDirectorRegistration query hooks were added to useQueries.ts.
hallucinated_features.reason: No backend query hook additions were requested; the build request explicitly states no backend logic changes.
